name: pq-companion
description: Desktop companion app for Project Quarm (EverQuest emulated server)
author: jasonsoprovich

scripts.dist: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && node scripts/verify-backend-fresh.cjs && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && node scripts/verify-backend-fresh.cjs && electron-builder --win
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/pq-companion-server.exe ./cmd/server
scripts.build:backend:win: cd backend && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/pq-companion-server.exe ./cmd/server
